docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,191.62 FILED BY ANSARI, QMARS AS TO DEFENDANT HOY-KWONG, NATHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOY-KWONG, NATHAN

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-01-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-29-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 MEDIATED SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1243.62. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS. REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOY-KWONG, NATHAN CASE WAS CONTINUED ON 3/3/05 FOR PROGRESS REPORT RE: MEDIATED SETTLEMENT. PLTF AND DEFT DID NOT APPEAR, SO CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
